---
title: "Experience"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-section">
  <p class="page-intro">
    18+ years of building, leading, and scaling platforms — from a regional ISP in Iran to a
    San Diego tech company and a UCSD data capstone.
  </p>

  <div class="timeline">

    <!-- Mobosoft -->
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-card">
        <div class="timeline-header">
          <div class="timeline-title-group">
            <h3>Founder & CEO</h3>
            <span class="timeline-company">Mobosoft Inc.</span>
            <span class="timeline-location"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> San Diego, CA</span>
          </div>
          <span class="timeline-date">Dec 2022 – Present</span>
        </div>
        <p class="timeline-type">Full-time · Founder</p>
        <ul class="timeline-bullets">
          <li>Designed and launched cloud infrastructure services including VPS hosting, dedicated servers, and IPv4 resource management — building scalable, high-availability platform foundations supporting multiple service lines</li>
          <li>Led integration of third-party payment processing APIs and B2B partner systems, managing API lifecycle requirements, service-level expectations, and cross-partner data flows</li>
          <li>Developed a pay-per-mile EV rental platform from concept through market validation, owning product roadmap, technical requirements, and cross-functional execution across engineering and commercial teams</li>
          <li>Applied data analytics to monitor platform performance and drive continuous improvement in service reliability and operational efficiency</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="timeline-tags">
          <span class="tag">Cloud Infrastructure</span>
          <span class="tag">API Integration</span>
          <span class="tag">Product Management</span>
          <span class="tag">EV Platform</span>
          <span class="tag">Data Analytics</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- UCSD Capstone -->
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-card">
        <div class="timeline-header">
          <div class="timeline-title-group">
            <h3>Capstone Project Lead</h3>
            <span class="timeline-company">UCSD × OccuSpace</span>
            <span class="timeline-location"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> San Diego, CA</span>
          </div>
          <span class="timeline-date">Jan 2026 – Jun 2026</span>
        </div>
        <p class="timeline-type">Academic Capstone · MSBA Program</p>
        <ul class="timeline-bullets">
          <li>Analyzed anonymized device-level movement data across UCSD campus — building data pipelines, probabilistic zone-to-zone transition models, and reporting visualizations for institutional stakeholders</li>
          <li>Delivered descriptive, predictive, and prescriptive analytics outputs using real OccuSpace production data, translating complex platform data into actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders</li>
          <li>Developed interactive GIS dashboards for UCSD Facilities and Campus Planning</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="timeline-tags">
          <span class="tag">Python</span>
          <span class="tag">GIS / Mapbox</span>
          <span class="tag">Spatial Analytics</span>
          <span class="tag">Data Pipelines</span>
          <span class="tag">Data Visualization</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Didehbannet -->
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-card">
        <div class="timeline-header">
          <div class="timeline-title-group">
            <h3>Co-Founder & CEO</h3>
            <span class="timeline-company">Didehbannet ISP</span>
            <span class="timeline-location"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Iran</span>
          </div>
          <span class="timeline-date">Jul 2004 – Jul 2022 · 18 yrs</span>
        </div>
        <p class="timeline-type">Full-time · Co-Founder</p>
        <ul class="timeline-bullets">
          <li>Built a proprietary CRM platform from scratch — architected user authentication, automated billing workflows, and API integrations connecting to multiple third-party systems, enabling scalable and interoperable customer lifecycle management</li>
          <li>Designed and maintained integration frameworks supporting 50,000+ POS terminal connections across the network, ensuring high-availability data flows, service reliability, and real-time connectivity at enterprise scale</li>
          <li>Delivered city-scale fiber optic infrastructure, defining platform architecture standards, service-level requirements, and phased rollout strategy to ensure long-term reliability and cross-product scalability</li>
          <li>Deployed a full Wi-Fi platform across Bahonar University — academic departments and dormitories — supporting 20,000+ active users with secure, scalable network services and centralized authentication</li>
          <li>Led B2B partnership negotiations and partner-facing API integrations with enterprise clients and strategic partners, translating complex technical requirements into clear product roadmaps for diverse stakeholders</li>
          <li>Directed IT strategy, network security compliance, and 24/7 service reliability for a regional telecommunications platform</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="timeline-tags">
          <span class="tag">CRM Platform</span>
          <span class="tag">API Integrations</span>
          <span class="tag">Fiber Optic Infrastructure</span>
          <span class="tag">Network Architecture</span>
          <span class="tag">B2B Partnerships</span>
          <span class="tag">50,000+ POS Terminals</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
